<?php namespace PayPalHttp\Serializer; use PayPalHttp\HttpRequest; use PayPalHttp\Serializer; /** * Class Text * @package PayPalHttp\Serializer * * Serializer for Text content types. */ class Text implements Serializer { public function contentType() { return "/^text\\/.*/"; } public function encode(HttpRequest $request) { $body = $request->body; if (is_string($body)) { return $body; } if (is_array($body)) { return json_encode($body); } return implode(" ", $body); } public function decode($data) { return $data; } }
